title: CalculusInstance
summary: Transfers the FG normal-form component identities into the abstract AlgebraicIdentities interface consumed by the operator calculus.

mathematicalContent.heading: Mathematical role
mathematicalContent.body: Transfers the FG normal-form component identities into the abstract AlgebraicIdentities interface consumed by the operator calculus.

mathematicalContent.heading: How to read the translation
mathematicalContent.body: The correspondence below follows Ambient/FG/CalculusInstance.lean declaration by declaration. A definition is translated by its defining expression, a theorem by its quantified proposition, and a structure, class, or inductive type by the mathematical data encoded in its fields or constructors. The original Lean signature remains visible beside every translation.

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: The ambient calculus induced by a certified normal-form Laplacian model. In explicit terms, for a of type normal ambient data conf, and l of type normal laplacian model a, its defining expression is straight : equals A.to Straight Form base Dim : equals L.base Dim Q : equals normal Q A X : equals L.X ambient Laplacian : equals L.ambient Laplacian.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \operatorname{toCalculus}(A,L)=\operatorname{straight} = A.\operatorname{toStraightForm} \operatorname{baseDim} = L.\operatorname{baseDim} Q = \operatorname{normalQ} A X = X_{\mathrm{L}} \widetilde{\Delta} = L.\operatorname{laplacian}
correspondence.leanType: def toCalculus (A : NormalAmbientData Conf) (L : NormalLaplacianModel A) : Operators.Calculus Conf

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: For A of type Normal Ambient Data Conf, and L of type Normal Laplacian Model A, A.to Calculus L.Q equals normal Q A.
correspondence.leanType: theorem toCalculus_Q (A : NormalAmbientData Conf) (L : NormalLaplacianModel A) : (A.toCalculus L).Q = normalQ A

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: For A of type Normal Ambient Data Conf, L of type Normal Laplacian Model A, and f of type Operators.Function Conf, A.to Calculus L.lap f equals L.ambient Laplacian f.
correspondence.leanType: theorem toCalculus_lap (A : NormalAmbientData Conf) (L : NormalLaplacianModel A) (f : Operators.Function Conf) : (A.toCalculus L).lap f = L.laplacian f

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: The certified normal-form Laplacian identities instantiate the algebraic identity package required by the existing tangentiality proofs. In symbols, the proposition is the statement displayed below.
correspondence.leanType: theorem FG_algebraicIdentities (A : NormalAmbientData Conf) (L : NormalLaplacianModel A) : (A.toCalculus L).AlgebraicIdentities

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Alias matching the first-stage target name. In symbols, the proposition is the statement displayed below.
correspondence.leanType: theorem straightForm_instantiates_AlgebraicIdentities (A : NormalAmbientData Conf) (L : NormalLaplacianModel A) : (A.toCalculus L).AlgebraicIdentities

references.locator: Chapters 2–3, ambient space and normal form
references.note: Geometric source for the ambient bundle, homogeneity, normal form, and commutator calculations.

limitations: This file establishes syntax, aggregate imports, or an abstract bridge. It must not be read as a derivation of the corresponding geometric theorem from concrete tensor and analytic data.
